CyberSheath attains perfect 110 score on CMMC Level 2; largest managed service vendor excels in compliance standards.
news.summary: A company based in Reston, Virginia, CyberSheath, known as the biggest CMMC managed service provider, has recently passed its own CMMC Level 2 assessment with a remarkable score of 110. Demonstrating the quality of their managed services, this accomplishment reaffirms that CyberSheath adheres to the stringent compliance standards mandated for Department of Defense (DOD) contractors. By achieving this perfect score, CyberSheath showcases its ability to align with the same standards they set for their clients.

news.headline: Intelsat wins U.S. Space Force contract to provide maritime satellite connectivity for DoD, part of 10-year IDIQ contract.
news.summary: Intelsat, headquartered in McLean, Virginia, has secured a contract with the U.S. Space Force to offer commercial satellite communications support to the U.S. Defense Department for global maritime operations. The contract spans 12 months and is a component of the pLEO 10-year IDIQ contract established in 2023. This agreement includes providing bandwidth, equipment, and services to the DoD for comprehensive maritime coverage globally. Intelsat, known for its vast satellite and terrestrial network, will play a crucial role in bolstering the Defense Department's communication capabilities in this sector.

news.headline: The Bump and Dear Media introduce "No Guide for This" podcast on adulting and parenting; features 2 episodes on Spotify and Apple Podcasts.
news.summary: A popular parenting resource, The Bump, has launched a new podcast called "No Guide For This," focusing on authentic stories of the journey from being an adult to becoming a parent. The podcast's initial episodes, "Is Parenting For Me?" and "Getting Real About Fertility" featuring guest Whitney Port, can be listened to on Spotify and Apple Podcasts. Hosted by The Bump’s Head of Marketing and Content, Jen, the podcast aims to provide real insights into parenthood.

news.headline: Ryder System honors Cheryl D. Sunshine and Joy Young as "Top Women to Watch in Transportation" by Redefining the Road.
news.summary: Miami-based Ryder System, Inc. (NYSE: R) is proud to announce that Cheryl D. Sunshine and Joy Young have been honored as part of the 2025 “Top Women to Watch in Transportation” by Redefining the Road, the official magazine of the Women In Trucking Association (WIT). The ninth edition of this annual list commemorates outstanding female professionals in the sector who have made notable career achievements in the past year. These women also demonstrate a commitment to advancing gender diversity within their company and the industry at large.

news.headline: Tetra Tech wins $46M USACE contract for engineering services, supporting critical projects.
news.summary: A California-based company, Tetra Tech, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTEK), known for its consulting and engineering services in water, environment, and sustainable infrastructure, has recently been granted a significant contract from the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (USACE) Los Angeles District. Valued at $46 million, this multiple-award contract spans over 3 years. Tetra Tech will be tasked with delivering extensive engineering and design services for various crucial projects as part of this agreement.

news.headline: Tractor Supply to webcast Q1 earnings call on April 24, 2025 at 10 a.m. ET, led by CEO Hal Lawton and CFO Kurt Barton.
news.summary: BRENTWOOD, Tenn.-- Tractor Supply Company, the leading rural lifestyle retailer in the U.S., plans to announce its Q1 2025 results before the market opens on Thursday, April 24, 2025. The company will conduct a conference call on April 24, 2025, at 10 a.m. ET, led by Hal Lawton, president and CEO, and Kurt Barton, EVP and CFO. Tractor Supply Company is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol TSCO.

news.headline: Goodwill KY and Diageo NA team up for Learning Skills for Life, empowering with essential skills for hospitality.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, a new program called Learning Skills for Life is launching with the goal of empowering individuals with crucial skills applicable to the tourism, lifestyle, and hospitality industries. This initiative strives to equip participants with essential knowledge and abilities that are valuable in these sectors.

news.headline: Consumers now spend $24,695 yearly on bills, totaling $4.55 trillion in economy; average household spends $2,058 per month.
news.summary: A report by doxo revealed that the average U.S. consumer spends $24,695 annually on household bills, contributing to a total Bill Pay Economy™ of $4.55 trillion by 2025. Of this amount, $3.45 trillion is allocated to the thirteen essential household bills. On average, U.S. households spend $2,058 per month, representing 31% of their income, on these vital bills. The report further outlines the market size for each bill category, showcasing the significant financial impact of household expenses on the average consumer.

news.headline: America faces a $411 billion annual cost due to sleep health crisis; only 7% Americans wake up rested daily.
news.summary: In New York, a significant sleep health crisis is affecting America, leading to detrimental effects on public health, workplace efficiency, and overall well-being. This crisis incurs a substantial cost to the U.S. economy, totaling $411 billion each year according to the RAND Corporation. A recent report by Dreem Health, a prominent digital sleep clinic operated by The Sunrise Group, highlights a concerning paradox. Despite 97 percent of Americans acknowledging the significance of sleep, merely 7 percent report waking up feeling adequately rested on a daily basis. This data emphasizes a critical issue facing individuals as they struggle with the challenges of insufficient sleep.

news.headline: ECP launches Move-Ins to streamline resident move-ins for senior living communities, benefiting 8,000 communities, increasing occupancy.
news.summary: In Milwaukee, ECP, a comprehensive software solution utilized by more than 8,00 senior living facilities, has introduced ECP Move-Ins. This new offering aims to streamline and speed up the resident move-in procedure, ultimately aiding providers in boosting occupancy rates and minimizing administrative burdens. ECP Move-Ins is designed to enhance the overall experience for new residents and their families by simplifying the often drawn-out process of welcoming new residents. Many communities struggle with delays in onboarding new residents due to face-to-face consultations, paper-based documentation, fragmented workflows, and misunderstandings.

news.headline: David&Goliath (D&G) named Creative Agency of Record for Finance of America, to provide financing solutions.
news.summary: In El Segundo, California, David&Goliath (D&G) has secured the Creative Agency of Record (AOR) position for Finance of America, a prominent provider of home equity-focused financial solutions for contemporary retirement planning. Emerging victorious in a competitive pitch process, D&G will handle key aspects such as business and brand strategies, creative initiatives, and continuous thought leadership endeavors for Finance of America. The goal of this partnership is to inform homeowners about their services and offerings, which cater to modern retirement needs.

news.headline: Sweetgreen introduces SG Rewards with free loyalty program offering 10 points for every dollar spent. Enjoy free items with points redemption.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based company Sweetgreen has introduced SG Rewards, a new loyalty program that is now available across the country. This complimentary program aims to provide customers with more of what they enjoy. Members can earn 10 points for each qualifying dollar spent, leading to various rewards and exclusive deals. SG Rewards offers the chance for members to receive complimentary favorite menu items like entrees or sides by redeeming their accumulated points. This new initiative prioritizes flexibility and incorporates feedback from guests to enhance their overall dining experience.

news.headline: New program by Common Sense Privacy provides seal for companies excelling in privacy, aiding consumers, parents, and schools.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a new privacy seal program by Common Sense Privacy aims to address the growing concern for privacy among consumers, parents, and educators. The program, available at www.commonsenseprivacy.net, offers companies the opportunity to showcase their dedication to privacy by obtaining the Common Sense Privacy Seal. This initiative is essential as many individuals lack the time and understanding to review lengthy privacy statements thoroughly. By displaying the seal, companies can signal their adherence to best practices in privacy policies. This proactive approach helps companies stand out by indicating their commitment to privacy with just a simple glance.

news.headline: T-Mobile collaborates with Disney Studios StudioLAB for Lilo & Stitch production using 5G, movie in theaters May 23.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile (TMUS) and Disney Studios StudioLAB have been working together since 2022 to explore the potential of 5G technology in storytelling. Their collaboration will be showcased in Disney's movie Lilo & Stitch, set to release on May 23. By utilizing T-Mobile's 5G network, production crews were able to seamlessly transmit high-quality scenes from the live-action film's Hawaii sets. This partnership aims to revolutionize how technology can enhance the cinematic experience, and the impact will be visible to millions when the movie hits theaters.

news.headline: Ronin Games 'Forgotten Runiverse' partners with 'Pixels' for PIXEL Collab, integrating PIXEL token into titles.
news.summary: Ronin-based Ethereum game developers have announced plans to work with the makers of the farming game Pixels to integrate the PIXEL token into Forgotten Runiverse. This collaboration will bring together the communities of both games and enhance the gaming experience for over 100,000 players on the Ronin platform.

news.headline: Nutanix plans .NEXT 2025 event in Washington, D.C. from May 7-9 to focus on AI, Cloud Native, Hybrid Multicloud.
news.summary: Nutanix has revealed details about the agenda for its upcoming .NEXT 2025 conference, scheduled to be held in Washington, D.C. from May 7th to May 9th in 2025.

news.headline: Mullen & Bollinger source 67% and 71% of US-made components respectively, gaining edge under new tariff rules.
news.summary: Mullen and Bollinger rely on U.S. suppliers for 67% and 71% of their vehicle components, respectively.

news.headline: Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DWTX) regains Nasdaq compliance by meeting minimum stockholders' equity.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DWTX) disclosed on April 3, 2025, that it has likely met the minimum stockholders' equity standard outlined in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1). The Company, specializing in new drug treatments for pain and fatigue-related conditions, is a development-stage biopharmaceutical entity. This announcement signals a positive development for Dogwood Therapeutics, Inc. in its efforts to comply with regulatory standards and maintain its listing on the Nasdaq stock exchange.

news.headline: Stargaze appoints three new advisors to enhance platform ahead of app relaunch in 2025.
news.summary: Three more prominent figures from the entertainment and business industries have united to steer Stargaze's transformation as it prepares for the preliminary relaunch of its app in 2025. The collaboration now includes a total of six influential leaders, signaling a significant expansion in expertise and experience within the project team. The upcoming relaunch in 2025 is anticipated to mark a pivotal moment for Stargaze, as it aims to redefine its approach and market presence under the guidance of these accomplished individuals.

news.headline: Precision Optics signed a main purchase agreement with a top aerospace customer, increasing program backlog to $6.6 million.
news.summary: In Gardner, Massachusetts on April 3, 2025, Precision Optics Corporation, Inc. (NASDAQ: POCI), a prominent maker of advanced optical instruments for medical and defense/aerospace sectors, divulged the signing of a Main Purchase Agreement. This contract dictates the terms of the collaboration between Precision Optics and a leading aerospace company. The focus of the agreement is to ramp up production of a commercial product utilizing Precision Optics’ exclusive manufacturing processes, showcasing a mutual dedication to growth and innovation in this venture.

news.headline: Verity partners with Minnesota Soybean Processors to track sustainable agriculture attributes for final products.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Gevo's subsidiary, Verity, and Minnesota Soybean Processors to transfer sustainability benefits to end products. This collaboration aims to enhance the sustainability of final products by leveraging the strengths of both companies. The partnership signifies a joint effort to incorporate sustainable practices in the production process, aligning with a growing demand for eco-friendly products among consumers. By combining their expertise, Verity and Minnesota Soybean Processors are set to significantly impact the industry's sustainable practices. This partnership is anticipated to result in a positive environmental impact, with potential savings of X% in carbon emissions and an estimated increase of X% in overall sustainability.

news.headline: Resmed launches NightOwl™, a user-friendly home sleep apnea test, now available in the US, providing simplified testing for obstructive sleep apnea.
news.summary: A recently approved home sleep test by the FDA offers a simplified and efficient way to diagnose obstructive sleep apnea. With FDA clearance, this test has proven to be effective in providing accurate results. This innovative solution eliminates the need for traditional testing methods, making it more accessible to individuals who suspect they may have sleep apnea. This advancement in sleep apnea testing has a significant impact on healthcare, increasing the convenience and effectiveness of diagnosis.
